articles.title: Trump says pilots are fine after U.S. helicopter crashes near Strait of Hormuz - NPR
articles.description: A U.S. Army Apache attack helicopter crashed near the Strait of Hormuz, with President Trump saying the two crew members on board were "fine" after the incident. Trump also expressed optimism over negotiations with Iran.

articles.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Futures, What to Watch — Live Updates - WSJ
articles.description: Live updates on markets and the top finance, economics and business stories. Plus the latest on oil prices, the Dow, S&P 500 and Nasdaq.

articles.title: Some Maine Democrats are wavering on Graham Platner - Politico
articles.description: The oysterman maintains a strong base of support, but his scandals have left a bad taste with some Democratic and independent voters.

articles.title: Adults should have no more than one drink a day, a team of scientists says - NBC News
articles.description: Americans should limit their alcohol consumption to no more than one drink per day, according to a study published Tuesday in the Journal of Studies on Alcohol and Drugs

articles.title: Don't miss Jupiter and Venus meet in a dazzling conjunction tonight: Here's where and when to look - Space
articles.description: Jupiter and Venus meet in the western sky tonight (June 9) — here's how to see it.

articles.title: Conflicts on rise globally, highest level since WWII, data shows - NPR
articles.description: Global conflicts surged to the highest number tallied by Uppsala Conflict Data Program. Fatalities were the highest on record since 1994, with approximately 244,600 people killed in conflict in 2025.

articles.title: NBA Finals: New York Knicks 111-115 San Antonio Spurs: Victor Wembanyama stars - BBC
articles.description: Victor Wembanyama scores 32 points as the San Antonio Spurs cut the New York Knicks' lead in the NBA Finals at Madison Square Garden.

articles.title: Some of the deadly earthquakes in the Philippines - AP News
articles.description: Earthquakes are common in the Philippines, which lies on the Pacific “Ring of Fire,” the arc of seismic faults around the ocean where most of the world's earthquakes occur. The strongest in 2026 occurred Monday when a magnitude 7.8 quake struck off Mindanao. …

articles.title: Apple introduces Siri AI, a profoundly more capable and personal assistant - Apple
articles.description: Apple introduces Siri AI, a profoundly more capable and personal assistant powered by Apple Intelligence, with personal context, world knowledge, and onscreen awareness.

articles.title: Trump booed at Knicks game during visit to New York - Axios
articles.description: Trump's visit to the NBA Finals game prompted heightened security measures in parts of NYC.

articles.title: Trump’s $100,000 fee on H-1B visas for highly skilled workers is struck down - The Washington Post
articles.description: A judge declared President Donald Trump’s fee unlawful. The fee narrowed a major pathway for legal immigration that is used by tech companies, hospitals and universities.

articles.title: Apple’s iOS 27 Is Filled With Hints About Its Upcoming Foldable iPhone - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Apple Inc.’s iOS 27 and related software updates offer the clearest public signs yet of the company’s upcoming foldable iPhone, revealing references to folding hardware and new features designed for larger, more flexible displays.

articles.title: NCAA appeals Brendan Sorsby ruling - NBC Sports
articles.description: As expected, the NCAA has appealed the court decision restoring the eligibility of Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby.

articles.title: Asia chip-linked shares recover after U.S. peers bounce back - CNBC
articles.description: In the U.S., chip stocks powered gains on Monday, helping the S&P 500 gain 0.3%, while the tech-heavy Nasdaq Composite advanced 0.86%.

articles.title: 5 things I already love from the iOS 27 beta - The Verge
articles.description: I’ve already been testing the first iOS 27 developer beta, and there are some features that I’m a big fan of, like Liquid Glass improvements and a new extra large option for widgets.

articles.title: Hollywood Finally Has A $1 Billion Box Office Hit In 2026 - SlashFilm
articles.description: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie has already crossed the billion-dollar mark at the box office, and it surely won't be the last 2026 movie to do so.
